arts.ttl: Torino Make Official Bid for PSG’s Ndour: The Intricate Web with Skriniar and PSG’s Transfer Strategy
arts.sum: Torino have stepped up their pursuit of Paris Saint-Germain's young talent Cher Ndour by submitting a formal offer for a permanent transfer. According to recent reports from Footmercato (via Calciomercato), the Serie A club is leading the race for the 20-year-old midfielder, who is currently on loan at Besiktas and has also attracted interest from Fiorentina. The post Torino Make Official Bid for PSG’s Ndour: The Intricate Web with Skriniar and PSG’s Transfer Strategy appeared first on FootItalia.com.
The official lineups have been announced ahead of Stuttgart's crucial Champions League clash against Paris Saint Germain.

arts.ttl: 5 reasons why VfB Stuttgart will beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Sebastian Hoeneß's side have scored a total of 10 goals in 2025 - that's an average of two per match - with Undav's fellow striker Ermedin Demirović adding a club-high eighth of the season against Freiburg and Germany winger Jamie Leweling scoring twice - from as many touches - against Bratislava (with one assist from Undav). Meanwhile, a 3-1 Champions League win away to Slovan Bratislava on Matchday 7 revived their hopes of a place in the play-offs of Europe's top club competition.

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Stuttgart’s Alexander Nübel ruled out for PSG clash
arts.sum: Sky Germany presently reports that VfB Stuttgart will have to do without their #1 in this evening's Champions' League fixture.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique responds to claims PSG could fix Champions League match
arts.sum: Luis Enrique takes his PSG side to Stuttgart in their final game of the first phase of the Champions League, with a draw enough to send both sides to the play-offs

arts.ttl: Man City and PSG face unexpected early exit from Champions League in dramatic round of 18 games
arts.sum: Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain each faces a shocking early exit from the Champions League for,the first time in more than a decade when the final round of games Wednesday decide the new 36-team standings. When the 18 games kick off at the same time, 9 p.m. Central European Time (2000 GMT), to complete the inaugural league-phase format, Man City is outside the top-24 places that advance to the knockout stage and 22nd-place PSG risks dropping out.
